output_preferences.style: Specific, actionable, and cited. No generic frameworks. Include numbers, sources, and concrete next steps.

output_preferences.avoid: Vague advice, generic templates, filler content, theoretical frameworks without practical application

custom_notes: Rahul values depth and specificity. He uses GPO to augment his capacity across 15 engines. Every output should be ready to act on, not just informational.
